module simd_i64x2_arith.12.wasm
assert_return add-sub v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000200000000000000 v128:00000000000000000200000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return mul-add v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:02000000000000000200000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000400000000000000
assert_return mul-sub v128:00000000000000000200000000000000 v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return sub-add v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000200000000000000 v128:00000000000000000200000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return add-neg v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return mul-neg v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:02000000000000000200000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000feffffffffffffff
assert_return sub-neg v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000feffffffffffffff
